input: Run notification handler on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected notification handler output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the notification handler workflow

input: Apply notification handler to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive notification handler analysis with evidence-tagged findings

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to notification handler
